response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially matched the reference lyrics for 'Brave Shine', but corrected slight deviations in the spoken performance (e.g. '言葉' instead of '約束', '明日' instead of '未来'). Transcribed the talk segment manually as it was not included in the reference lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: Used the reference lyrics for 'Brave Shine' as a base, then switched to 100% manual transcription for the talk segment (from 01:52 onwards) to capture the VTubers' interactions.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed all subtitles tightly with vocal starts and stops. Created seamless transitions in conversational parts to avoid overlapping or lagging issues, keeping reading pacing comfortable. No subtitles were placed during pure instrumental sections (01:36 - 01:52).

subtitles.original: 立てなくなっても 運命は進む
subtitles.english: Even if I can't stand anymore, destiny proceeds.

subtitles.original: Break down
subtitles.english: Break down

subtitles.original: 崩れ落ちてゆく 星座が傷つけあう夜
subtitles.english: In this night where crumbling constellations hurt each other...

subtitles.original: You're breaking dawn
subtitles.english: You're breaking dawn

subtitles.original: 交わした言葉の中に
subtitles.english: In the words we exchanged...

subtitles.original: 独りを支えた
subtitles.english: that supported me when I was alone...

subtitles.original: 確かな夢を 抱えて
subtitles.english: I carry a certain dream.

subtitles.original: 守りたいものを 守れるのなら
subtitles.english: If I can protect what I want to protect...

subtitles.original: すべてを受け入れて 明日を探す
subtitles.english: I accept everything and search for tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 夜明けを灯す
subtitles.english: I'll light the dawn.

subtitles.original: Brave shine
subtitles.english: Brave shine

subtitles.original: 手を伸ばせばまだ
subtitles.english: If I reach out my hand, it's still there.

subtitles.original: Stay the night 傷だらけの夜
subtitles.english: Stay the night, in this night covered in scars...

subtitles.original: You save my life
subtitles.english: You save my life

subtitles.original: 重ねた涙の果てに
subtitles.english: At the end of the tears I've piled up...

subtitles.original: 光を見つけた
subtitles.english: I found light.

subtitles.original: 祈りは時を超えて
subtitles.english: My prayers transcend time.

subtitles.original: Brave shine
subtitles.english: Brave shine

subtitles.english: Happy Birthday! Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: Shall we introduce ourselves?
subtitles.english: Shall we introduce ourselves?

subtitles.original: Of course! Please do!
subtitles.english: Of course! Please do!

subtitles.original: Okay, 自己紹介お願いします、先輩。
subtitles.english: Okay, please introduce yourself, Senpai.

subtitles.original: Introduction, okay? Yes, please!
subtitles.english: Introduction, okay? Yes, please!

subtitles.english: ...Tokoyami Towa-sama! Yay!

subtitles.english: Old senpai! Yay yay yay!

subtitles.original: オールド先輩か...
subtitles.english: Old senpai, huh...

subtitles.original: Eh? Old senpai? Oh, really?
subtitles.english: Eh? Old senpai? Oh, really?

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って... Calliope is only a little bit younger in that case than Towa-sama!
subtitles.english: Wait a minute... Calliope is only a little bit younger in that case than Towa-sama!

subtitles.original: What? Okay, fine.
subtitles.english: What? Okay, fine.

subtitles.english: Hello, um, everyone. I'm the old senpai, Mori Calliope. Yay!

subtitles.original: Fellow pink! Pink is powerful!
subtitles.english: Fellow pink! Pink is powerful!

subtitles.english: Yay! Pink is powerful!

subtitles.english: Towa-sama, you're also pink.

subtitles.english: Pink? Me? I'm pink?

subtitles.original: Pink, kind of! Of course, different shades of pink, right?
subtitles.english: Pink, kind of! Of course, different shades of pink, right?

subtitles.english: Yeah, the colors are so important in this life, so we must say that this is the pink team, right?

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Nice, wonderful! But you know, the lighting actually when we were singing the song that we just sang a moment ago was blue.
subtitles.english: Nice, wonderful! But you know, the lighting actually when we were singing the song that we just sang a moment ago was blue.

subtitles.original: Yeah, was blue. So pretty, right? Look at that.
subtitles.english: Yeah, was blue. So pretty, right? Look at that.

subtitles.original: What kind of emotion do you think the blue represents?
subtitles.english: What kind of emotion do you think the blue represents?

subtitles.english: What kind of emotion? Blue?

subtitles.original: Blue?
subtitles.english: Blue?

subtitles.original: ブルーは結構寂しいとか...
subtitles.english: Blue represents feeling lonely...

subtitles.original: ちょっとそういう悲しいみたいなイメージはあるけど、でも、綺麗なイメージもあるよ。
subtitles.english: ...or having a sad image, but it also has a beautiful image too.

subtitles.original: Yeah, also beautiful. Sad, lonely, also beautiful.
subtitles.english: Yeah, also beautiful. Sad, lonely, also beautiful.

subtitles.original: For Calliope, I think sometimes maybe there's some fear, right? 怖さ。A little scary, right?
subtitles.english: For Calliope, I think sometimes maybe there's some fear, right? Fear. A little scary, right?

subtitles.original: But, you know, emotions are beautiful, right? 感情がめっちゃ美しいと思う。Right?
subtitles.english: But, you know, emotions are beautiful, right? I think emotions are really beautiful. Right?

subtitles.original: So positive, negative, either way, I think colors are really beautiful.
subtitles.english: So positive, negative, either way, I think colors are really beautiful.

subtitles.original: I agree with you! And you know, even if sometimes we have fear and we're scared of doing something, maybe...
subtitles.english: I agree with you! And you know, even if sometimes we have fear and we're scared of doing something, maybe...

subtitles.original: maybe we should overcome, we should do our best to, you know...
subtitles.english: maybe we should overcome, we should do our best to, you know...

subtitles.original: 怖くても、we have to do our best, right? 頑張らないといけないね。
subtitles.english: Even if we're scared, we have to do our best, right? We have to keep trying.

subtitles.original: Yes!
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: For example, singing on stage together, speaking Japanese, it's so scary! You just got to try your best...
subtitles.english: For example, singing on stage together, speaking Japanese, it's so scary! You just got to try your best...

subtitles.original: ...throw your fears away. 怖くないよ。
subtitles.english: ...throw your fears away. It's not scary.

subtitles.original: How do you overcome? It's so scary!
subtitles.english: How do you overcome? It's so scary!

subtitles.original: We just sang Brave Shine! Brave Shine! We just sang, so...
subtitles.english: We just sang Brave Shine! Brave Shine! We just sang, so...

subtitles.original: It's such a good song, it's very fitting.
subtitles.english: It's such a good song, it's very fitting.

subtitles.original: Right? Yeah, fight your fears! 怖くないね。勇気持って。Courage. And, yeah, challenge your dreams!
subtitles.english: Right? Yeah, fight your fears! It's not scary. Have courage. Courage. And, yeah, challenge your dreams!

subtitles.original: Yeah, but fears are also part of our lives, right? Like, maybe if we're not... if we don't feel the fear, then...
subtitles.english: Yeah, but fears are also part of our lives, right? Like, maybe if we're not... if we don't feel the fear, then...

subtitles.original: how can we overcome? Like, how can we do... how to say... how can we do...
subtitles.english: how can we overcome? Like, how can we do... how to say... how can we do...

subtitles.original: I don't know the word... like...
subtitles.english: I don't know the word... like...

subtitles.original: How can we challenge our past selves?
subtitles.english: How can we challenge our past selves?

subtitles.original: How can we challenge ourselves and do our best every single day, right?
subtitles.english: How can we challenge ourselves and do our best every single day, right?

subtitles.original: 怖くなかったら、well, it's not a challenge, right? チャレンジじゃないよね。
subtitles.english: If we weren't scared, well, it's not a challenge, right? It wouldn't be a challenge.

subtitles.original: うん、うん、確かにね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, that's true.

subtitles.original: 怖かったらもっと...
subtitles.english: If you're scared, even more...
